metadata.title: eCommerce | Adon ERP
metadata.description: Sell anything, anywhere, with everything connected in one app. Create your store, manage products, accept orders, and grow your brand beautifully.

hero.title: Open source
hero.description: Sell anything, anywhere, with everything connected in one app. Create your store, manage products, accept orders, and grow your brand beautifully.

noCodeSection.title: No code Mode
noCodeSection.description: Build your online store visually. Add products, edit pages, manage checkout, customize layouts, and publish without writing code.

productPage.title: Sugar Bloom Box
productPage.description: A beautiful product page with images, reviews, product options, and quick checkout.

productKingSection.title: Product
productKingSection.subtitle: Adaptable products
productKingSection.description: Build simple products, variants, digital products, services, bundles, and subscriptions. Every product can include images, inventory rules, pricing, descriptions, and promotions.

stockManagement.title: Advanced stock management
stockManagement.description: Manage your store with connected data and smart actions.

productOptions.title: Flexible product options
productOptions.description: Manage your store with connected data and smart actions.

upselling.title: Upsells and cross-selling
upselling.description: Manage your store with connected data and smart actions.

loyaltySection.title: Bump up
loyaltySection.subtitle: maximize revenues
loyaltySection.description: Encourage conversations, collect customer feedback, create rewards, send promotions, and keep your buyers coming back.

messages.title: Messages
messages.message1: Hi! Do you have this chair in black?
messages.message2: Yes, it is available for delivery today.
messages.message3: Perfect, I will place the order now!

analyticsSection.title: Your store in the
analyticsSection.description: Understand visitors, revenue, conversion, products, and campaign performance with visual ecommerce analytics.

onlineShop.title: Online shop
onlineShop.description: Built with ecommerce, website, inventory, and marketing.

agencySite.title: Agency site
agencySite.description: Built with ecommerce, website, inventory, and marketing.

gamingBrand.title: Gaming brand
gamingBrand.description: Built with ecommerce, website, inventory, and marketing.

mobileAdaptive.title: Mobile adaptive
mobileAdaptive.description: Your online store looks clean, fast, and professional on every screen size.

clickCollect.title: Click and collect
clickCollect.description: Let customers order online and collect products directly from your shop.

integration.title: Integration
integration.description: Connect ecommerce with inventory, invoicing, marketing, CRM, and analytics.

shippingOption.title: Shipping option
shippingOption.description: Create delivery methods, shipping zones, and flexible checkout options.

appsSection.title: One
appsSection.description: Expand as you grow with integrated apps that work together.

ctaSection.title: Join 15 million users
ctaSection.description: who grow their business with Adon

testimonial.quote: Adon transformed our operations by integrating ecommerce functions, simplifying product management, and offering cost-effective maintenance.
testimonial.name: Noah Carter
testimonial.title: eCommerce Founder
